# Box of Earth ◆

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item. Gift.*

---

Play only if you control a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** hero.
Attach to a hero.
**Action**: Exhaust Box of Earth to choose a location. Place 1 progress on that location and give it the **_Forest_** trait until the end of the round.

---

> *“It will not keep you on your road, nor defend you against any peril; but if you keep it… it may reward you.”*
> —Galadriel, The Fellowship of the Ring

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Fire on the Eastemnet]] #43
